description_long: This object is a vintage steam-powered vehicle with a large, rectangular metal canopy covering its upper structure. The body is predominantly black with brass and gold accents, featuring two large spoked wheels at the rear and two smaller spoked wheels at the front. The side panels display mechanical components, including a visible flywheel, pistons, and a smokestack protruding from the top. The canopy has a weathered, grayish finish, and there are small details such as a chimney, a pressure valve, and a pair of brass fittings on the roof. The vehicle's design is reminiscent of early traction engines or steam tractors, with ornate detailing and exposed machinery. The overall appearance suggests a heavy, industrial construction typical of late 19th to early 20th-century engineering.
description: A vintage steam-powered vehicle with a large metal canopy, black and brass body, and exposed mechanical components. Features large spoked wheels and ornate industrial detailing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the large rear and smaller front spoked wheels, exposed flywheel, and mechanical details beneath the gray canopy.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded front, chimney, and the width of the canopy, with both front wheels visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying similar wheel arrangement and mechanical components, with a visible decorative plate on the side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the canopy, rear wheels, and the open structure beneath the roof.
